hooks.prompt:
Before ending this session, check whether you have run /handoff during THIS session (not whether a handoff file exists for today — there may be multiple sessions per day).

If /handoff was NOT run in this session:
  Use AskUserQuestion to ask the user:
  "這個 session 還沒寫工作紀錄。"
  A) 現在寫（執行 /handoff 流程）
  B) 跳過，下次再說

  If user chooses A: run the /handoff workflow.
  If user chooses B or does not respond: end gracefully.

If /handoff WAS already run: end without prompting.
